name: gaxia-skills
description: A skill-builder's toolkit plus an on-demand tutor and a token-economy mode: author orchestrator skills (creating-workflow-skills), route any work through the right workflow (start-work), benchmark skills with real evidence (benchmarking-skills), learn any topic on demand (lemme-teach-you), and work cheaply by delegating to subagents (dont-burn-my-tokens).
